alkylation reagent: adding the same volume of 55 mM iodoacetamide in 50 mM ammonium bicarbonate.
alkylation concentration: adding the same volume of 55 mM iodoacetamide in 50 mM ammonium bicarbonate.
cleavage agent: rehydrated with Trypsin Gold protein digest enzyme (Promega, V5280).
enrichment method: we adopted this standard procedure and called it ExtraPEG.
instrument: externally calibrated Thermo LTQ Orbitrap Velos nLC-ESI-LIT-Orbitrap.
labeling: protein was analyzed by mass spectrometry.
reduction reagent: 25 mM dithiothreitol in 50 mM ammonium bicarbonate.
reduction concentration: 25 mM dithiothreitol in 50 mM ammonium bicarbonate.
